title: cenostigma pinnatum var. oblongifolium
intro: Cenostigma pinnatum var. oblongifolium, also known as the Cenostigma plant, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the family Malpighiaceae. It is traditionally used in herbal medicine, particularly in the tropical regions of Asia, where it is valued for its medicinal properties. The plant has been found to possess anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, making it beneficial for the treatment of various health conditions, including fever, digestive issues, and respiratory problems. The herbal preparations of the Cenostigma plant include teas, infusions, and extracts, which can be used to treat various ailments and promote overall health and well-being.
